/I think }}/answer
To fling a palm-sized object on a table, I would extend my right arm and start with my hand near shoulder height. I would apply a moderate force to the object, ensuring it moves forward at an angle, approximately sideways. The motion involves a downward and forward vertical direction as the hand releases the object. This action is performed smoothly and with control to achieve a flinging motion typical for a right-handed individual. Thus, the description of the action is: starting from shoulder height, extending my arm, applying moderate force, and moving the hand downward and forward to release the object onto the table.

{
  "FORCE": "moderate",

  "HAND": "shoulder height",
  "VD": "downward",
  "HD": "forward"
}
```/answer
